title: Marsdenia celebica

This plant is native to the Celebes, a region in Indonesia. The classification of Marsdenia celebica is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Gentianales. intro: Marsdenia celebica, also known as the Celebes milk vine or Marsdenia, is a tropical plant species native to the Celebes Island in Indonesia, characterized by its unique, milky latex.
